notes: code-quality question on a 20-line snippet, no launch stakes; answerable by direct inspection

messages.content: wrote this myself, a little proud of it. it dedupes contacts by email and keeps the newest one
Nicely done — reducing into a Map keyed by lowercased email and comparing `updatedAt` is exactly the right shape for this. It's O(n) and handles the empty-array case for free.
is this code clean though? like would a real engineer roll their eyes at anything in it
